description: CompositionWhite full sleeves t-shirt with a round neck, made of 100% cotton,  ribbed neckline and cuffs, short buttoned placket, rubber print below the right shoulder and left sleeve, brand tab appliquéd on the front next to the hem FittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in warm water at 40 C Use mild detergent Do not scrub Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Do not wring Do not dry in direct sunlight Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Wash, dry and iron inside out Do not dry clean It's just not possible to go wrong in a white tee. And even better if it's from s.oliver. Roll up the sleeves of this full-sleeved classic t-shirt if you wish to look even more casual. Team it with blue jeans and you're ready to take the world by storm!Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
